Actually, I just had another idea. What if the game is about clicking on the small cells within the center pieces to change their color? The center pieces are made of 2x2 cells (4 pixels each). Maybe clicking on a grey cell changes it to white, or vice versa.
Let me try clicking on a grey cell within the top-left center piece. Node 8 is grey, 4 pixels, center (10, 12). The cells would be at rows 10-11, cols 12-13. Let me click at row 10, col 12.
